title: hyptis passerina f. latifolia
intro: Hyptis passerina f. latifolia, also known as sweet hyptis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub native to Mexico and Central America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Hyptis passerina f. latifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to promote digestion, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
